response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead technical projects across diverse stacks and domains
Strong open-source contributions and developer advocacy through workshops and tools
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
AI/ML experience appears incidental rather than core or sustained over 8+ years
Lack of documented customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise cloud AI deployments
